name: daio-contracts
description: DAIO post-audit consensus and settlement contracts

scripts.deploy:sepolia: node scripts/run-with-rpc-fallback.js hardhat run scripts/deploy.js --network sepolia
scripts.finalize:sepolia: node scripts/run-with-rpc-fallback.js hardhat run scripts/finalize-sepolia-deployment.js --network sepolia
scripts.verify:sepolia: node scripts/run-with-rpc-fallback.js hardhat run scripts/verify-sepolia-setup.js --network sepolia
